mapper.select: select b.id, b.title, b.description, b.create_time, b.views, b.words, b.read_time, b.is_top, b.password, (not b.is_published) as privacy, c.id as c_id, c.category_name as c_name, t.id as t_id, t.tag_name as t_name, t.color as t_color from blog b left join category c on b.category_id = c.id left join blog_tag bt on b.id = bt.blog_id left join tag t on bt.tag_id = t.id where b.is_published = true order by b.is_top desc, b.create_time desc

select b.id, b.title, b.description, b.create_time, b.views, b.words, b.read_time, b.is_top, b.password, (not b.is_published) as privacy, c.id as c_id, c.category_name as c_name, t.id as t_id, t.tag_name as t_name, t.color as t_color from blog b left join category c on b.category_id = c.id left join blog_tag bt on b.id = bt.blog_id left join tag t on bt.tag_id = t.id where b.is_published = true and c.category_name = #{categoryName} order by b.is_top desc, b.create_time desc

select b.id, b.title, b.description, b.create_time, b.views, b.words, b.read_time, b.is_top, b.password, (not b.is_published) as privacy, c.id as c_id, c.category_name as c_name, t.id as t_id, t.tag_name as t_name, t.color as t_color from blog b left join category c on b.category_id = c.id left join blog_tag bt on b.id = bt.blog_id left join tag t on bt.tag_id = t.id where b.is_published = true and b.id in ( select bt2.blog_id from blog_tag bt2 left join tag t2 on bt2.tag_id = t2.id where t2.tag_name = #{tagName} ) order by b.is_top desc, b.create_time desc
select id, title, content from blog where is_published = true and password is null and (title like concat('%', #{query}, '%') or content like concat('%', #{query}, '%'))
select id, title, create_time as createTime from blog where is_published = true order by create_time desc limit 3
select id, title, first_picture as firstPicture, create_time as createTime, password from blog where is_published = true and is_recommend = true order by rand() limit 5
select * from blog where id = #{id}
select password from blog where id = #{blogId}
select is_comment_enabled from blog where id = #{blogId}
select is_published from blog where id = #{blogId}
select title from blog where id = #{id}
select id, title from blog order by create_time desc

select * from blog
and title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
and category_id = #{categoryId}
order by create_time desc
select date_format(create_time, '%Y年%m月') as yearMonth from blog where is_published = true group by yearMonth order by yearMonth desc
mapper.insert: insert into blog (title, first_picture, content, description, is_published, is_recommend, is_appreciation, is_comment_enabled, is_top, create_time, update_time, views, words, read_time, category_id, password, user_id) values (#{title}, #{firstPicture}, #{content}, #{description}, #{published}, #{recommend}, #{appreciation}, #{commentEnabled}, #{top}, now(), now(), 0, #{words}, #{readTime}, #{cateId}, #{password}, #{userId})
mapper.update: update blog set is_recommend = #{recommend} where id = #{blogId}

update blog set is_published = #{blogVisibility.published}, is_appreciation = #{blogVisibility.appreciation}, is_recommend = #{blogVisibility.recommend}, is_comment_enabled = #{blogVisibility.commentEnabled}, is_top = #{blogVisibility.top}, password = #{blogVisibility.password} where id = #{blogId}
update blog set is_top = #{top} where id = #{blogId}
update blog set views = #{views} where id = #{blogId}

update blog set title = #{title}, first_picture = #{firstPicture}, content = #{content}, description = #{description}, is_published = #{published}, is_recommend = #{recommend}, is_appreciation = #{appreciation}, is_comment_enabled = #{commentEnabled}, is_top = #{top}, update_time = now(), words = #{words}, read_time = #{readTime}, category_id = #{cateId}, password = #{password} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from blog
select count(*) from blog where is_published = true
select count(*) from blog where category_id = #{categoryId}
select count(*) from blog_tag where tag_id = #{tagId}
select id, category_name as name from category where id = #{id}
select id, category_name as name from category where category_name = #{name}
select t.id, t.tag_name as name, t.color from tag t left join blog_tag bt on t.id = bt.tag_id where bt.blog_id = #{blogId}
select category_id from blog where id = #{blogId}
